steps.title: Translate the percent statements
steps.content:
The statements give two expressions for $a$.
$$a=2.40b$$
$$a=0.70c$$
Set them equal.
$$2.40b=0.70c$$

steps.title: Find c as a percent of b
steps.content: Solve for $c$ in terms of $b$. $$c=\frac{2.40}{0.70}b=\frac{24}{7}b$$ So $$\frac{p}{100}=\frac{24}{7}$$ $$p=\frac{2{,}400}{7}=342.857142$$ The answer is D.
